title: Morrisons Supermarket Changes Jobs
summary: Morrisons, a big supermarket in the UK, is planning to cut about 200 jobs at its head office in Bradford. This means some people might lose their jobs as part of a change to how the company works. Morrisons is using more technology like AI to do some tasks automatically, which is why they need fewer workers in the office. The company has about 96,000 employees in total, and these cuts affect less than one-tenth of the head office staff. Morrisons is talking to the workers to help them find other jobs in the company if possible. They say this is a tough decision but necessary to make the business better. The company is also trying to keep prices low for customers during hard times.

options: Helping them find other jobs in the company
questions.correct_answer: Helping them find other jobs in the company

questions.question: How many total employees does Morrisons have in the UK?
Why is Morrisons making these job cuts?
options: As part of a restructuring to use more technology
To move to a new country
questions.correct_answer: As part of a restructuring to use more technology

background_read: Morrisons is a large supermarket chain in the UK that sells food and other items. Companies sometimes change how they work to save money or use new technology, which can affect jobs. In this case, Morrisons is using AI, which is like smart computer programs, to do some work automatically, so they need fewer people in their head office. This can be sad for workers, but companies often try to help them find new jobs.
Article_Structure: WHAT: Planning to cut 200 jobs at head office in Bradford
WHY: To restructure and use more AI technology to automate tasks

perspectives.description: Morrisons says the job cuts are necessary to improve the business and help customers with prices.
Workers might worry about losing their jobs and need support to find new roles.
